item.title: [Latent Space] Dreamer: the Agent OS for Everyone — David Singleton
item.description: Obviously, it's really cool to have software that will work on your behalf, but it's only useful if you can trust it, right? So, privacy and security is very important to us. And so, as we started to think about this problem, we realized that we actually had to build something that's a bit like an operating system. You know, the sidekick's like the kernel, the agents and apps are like users. Different rings. Exactly. Because if you try to pick off just one piece of this, you can't actually make ...
